Hardware Component File

EDC16C41 4.2 - V60 ZD-K VU Euro 4 v5

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference edc16c41_zdk_euro_4_v60_v_5.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "0098",
    "version": "4000"
  }
]

Trame Fonction RV/LV I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21D1
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Multiplex closed brake switch inputWire connection opened brake switch inputBooléen panne mémorisée switch freinBooléen panne présente switch freinSpeed limiter main switch ONCruise control main switch ONRESUME key pressedSET - key pressedSET + key pressedSUSPEND key pressedShut-off due to supsend key pressedShut-off due to brake pressedShut-off due to ASR requestShut-off due to engine gearbox disconnectionShut-off due to CC/SL failureShut-off due to gear in neutralShut-off due to engine controlShut-off due to vehicle speed/setpoint ratio too highShut-off due to invalid vehicle speedCC/SL main switch detection statusClutch detection statusSpeed limiter detection statusCruise control detection statusEtat affichage RVEtat régulateur de vitesseIDUCEMemorized failure on both brake switchesCurrent failure on both brake switchesRequete clignotement vitesseVehicle speedClutch contact booleanMemorized failure on inconsistency state of CC/SL switchCurrent failure on CC/SL main switch (inconsistency)Memorized failure on cruise control panelCurrent failure on CC/SL panelMemorized failure on one of brake switchesCurrent failure on one of brake switchCC/SL vehicle speed setpointState change detection on opened brake switchVitesse véhicule Affichée (RVLV)ACC control unit connection statusShut-off due to AT in limp home mode

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
